title: The Last Dance Together
content: At the end of their university graduation party, the band announced one final song. Emma and Lucas walked onto the dance floor, knowing this would be the last evening before their lives took different directions. They danced slowly, laughing about memories from the past four years and wondering what the future might bring. When the music ended, neither wanted to say goodbye. Instead, they promised that distance would never erase everything they had built together. The last dance of one chapter quietly became the first step toward another.
